title: Trump says he's 'concerned' about Ebola
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was asked if he was concerned about the Ebola outbreak after an American tested positive for the virus.

title: Daily Briefing: Which states have May 19 elections?
shortDescription: Six states hold elections in a consequential day for midterms. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Trump wants White House helipad while Mar-a-Lago's sparks 'anxiety'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a helipad for the White House South Lawn. The helipad at Mar-a-Lago is tightly regulated by the town.

title: Trump delays planned strikes as Iran calls for lifting of sanctions
shortDescription: The president claimed a purported deal would ensure Iran does not obtain a nuclear weapon.

title: Will Trump's revenge tour determine key primaries in the South?
shortDescription: Primaries in Kentucky, Georgia and Alabama will test the power of Donald Trump's endorsements. Pennsylvania, Idaho and Oregon also vote May 19

title: Jackson warns of Supreme Court appearing partisan in election cases
shortDescription: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson amplified her concern about the appearance of partisanship in the court's recent Voting Rights Act decision.

title: Trump wants investigation into Maryland ballot mix up, jabs Gov. Wes Moore
shortDescription: Some voters received a ballot for the wrong party ahead of the June 23 primary election, the Maryland State Board of Elections said last week.

title: Trump calls off Iran strikes for 'a little while'
shortDescription: Trump said Monday he put off a planned attack on Iran for "a little while, hopefully, maybe forever" at the request of U.S. allies in the Middle East.

title: Three things to look for in a jam-packed primary election week
shortDescription: Voters weigh in on House, Senate and gubernatorial races across the country in a packed election day.

title: DOJ offering $1.776B to settle Trump IRS lawsuit
shortDescription: The Justice Department offered a $1.776 billion settlement after President Donald Trump dropped a $10 billion IRS lawsuit.

title: Trump wants to put a helipad at the White House. Where would it be?
shortDescription: The possible addition to the White House would be the latest in a series of makeovers DC has seen under President Donald Trump's eye.

title: Will Georgia midterm primary races go to a runoff? Second vote likely
shortDescription: There are multiple close races in the Georgia midterm primaries, meaning the likelihood of a runoff, and second vote, is high.

title: Trump trades millions in stocks while promoting companies
shortDescription: Trump traded millions in stocks while promoting companies such as Nvidia, Apple and Microsoft, which critics said raised ethical concerns.

title: Texas GOP Senate runoff voting begins as Democrat ties in new poll
shortDescription: Early voting begins in the Texas GOP Senate runoff as a new poll shows Democrat James Talarico tied with both Cornyn and Paxton for November.

title: What's next for Trump's ballroom after $1 billion setback in Senate?
shortDescription: The Senate parliamentarian ruled $1 billion in security for President Trump's ballroom project needs 60 votes, not a simple majority, to pass.

title: Hochul says president 'encouraged' LIRR strike; can Trump end it?
shortDescription: President Trump wrote that he could help with negotiations as the LIRR strike continues.

title: DOJ offering $1.8 billion 'lawfare' fund to settle Trump IRS lawsuit
shortDescription: The Justice Department is offering $1.776 billion to "victims of lawfare and weaponization" to settle President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit.

title: Senate hopeful Haley Stevens booed during Democratic convention
shortDescription: Representative Haley Stevens was met with boos while giving a speech at the Michigan Democratic Endorsement Convention in Detroit on Sunday, April 19.

title: Trump posts AI-generated image of himself beside a handcuffed alien
shortDescription: The posts come a week after the Pentagon released what it described as "never-before-seen" documents on unidentified flying objects.

title: Trump approval rating sinks to term low in new poll amid Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating hit a new low in a New York Times/Siena poll out May 18. Reponses showed unease about the war in Iran and prices.

title: Trump vs. Massie in Kentucky primary
shortDescription: President Donald Trump endorsed Captain Ed Gallrein for Congress, who is running against incumbent Republican Thomas Massie in Kentucky.

title: Election Day voting guide in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania primary election
shortDescription: Pennsylvania's primary election will take place on May 19. Here's everything Allegheny County voters need to know for Election Day.

title: See photos, video from Trump's national prayer event in Washington
shortDescription: The prayer event was billed as an "assembly of voices united by a love of God and country" tied to the nation's 250th birthday.
